raw: This pass will provide reduced general admission of $5 for four (4) adults (18 years and over). Youths 17 and under are always free and should be reserved as child tickets. This pass is emailed to you - you will not need to come in to the library to pick it up. Please make sure you enter your current email address when making your reservation.

source_phrases.max_adults: reduced general admission of $5 for four (4) adults
source_phrases.free_under_age: Youths 17 and under are always free
